---
title: Projects
listing:
  contents: projects/projects.yml
  type: grid
  max-description-length: 250
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: "200"
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
div#listing-listing .card,
div#listing-projects .card {
  border: none !important;
  border-width: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}
div#listing-listing .quarto-grid-item img,
div#listing-projects .quarto-grid-item img {
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
}
</style>
```
